moments.title: Wimbledon Main Draw Begins
moments.blurb: The world-famous tennis championships at Wimbledon kick off their main draw on Monday, June 29, running through to July 12, with qualifying rounds already underway.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Centre Court calls! Wimbledon's main draw starts Monday. Who are you backing for the title this year? #Wimbledon

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: Game, set, match! Wimbledon's main draw gets underway on Monday. Perfect excuse for strawberries and cream in Devon, right? #Wimbledon

angles.name: First Round Excitement
angles.copy: The grass is ready, the players are primed! Wimbledon's first round begins June 29. Expect some early upsets!

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Heats Up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13 continues nightly (except Saturdays) at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, with the Islanders' quest for romance and £50,000 reaching peak drama.

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Got a text! 💌 Another night, another dose of Love Island drama. Who's cracking on tonight? Tune in at 9pm on ITV2/ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is delivering the goods again. What's been your favourite moment (or most shocking twist) this week?

angles.name: Catch Up
angles.copy: Missed the latest Love Island? All the recouplings and drama are waiting for you on ITVX. Get caught up before tonight's episode!

moments.title: Sam Ryder Turns 37
moments.blurb: UK Eurovision star and singer-songwriter Sam Ryder, famous for 'Space Man', celebrates his 37th birthday on June 25.

angles.name: UK Talent Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 37th Birthday to our very own Sam Ryder! What's your favourite soaring anthem from the Space Man?

angles.name: Eurovision Favourite
angles.copy: Wishing Sam Ryder a fantastic 37th Birthday! Still buzzing from his incredible Eurovision performance. What's your top Sam Ryder song?

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 (Final) on Disney+
moments.blurb: The critically acclaimed series 'The Bear' returns for its fifth and final season on Disney+ this Friday, June 26, promising a fiery conclusion to the Chicago kitchen drama.

angles.name: Final Season Drop
angles.copy: Yes, Chef! The fifth and final season of 'The Bear' lands on Disney+ this Friday. Are you ready for the heat of the kitchen one last time?

angles.name: Binge Watch Alert
angles.copy: Clear your weekend plans! The final season of 'The Bear' is coming to Disney+ on June 26. Time to binge-watch and say goodbye to Carmy and the crew.

moments.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender Season 2 on Netflix
moments.blurb: The live-action adaptation of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' returns for its second season on Netflix on Thursday, June 25.

angles.name: New Season Netflix
angles.copy: The Avatar returns! Season 2 of 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' drops on Netflix this Thursday. Who's excited to see Aang's next adventure?

angles.name: Bending Back
angles.copy: Get ready to bend! The live-action 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' Season 2 is on Netflix from June 25. What element are you hoping to see more of?

moments.title: A Woman of Substance New Adaptation on BritBox
moments.blurb: A new adaptation of the classic saga 'A Woman of Substance', starring Brenda Blethyn and Jessica Reynolds, premieres today, June 24, on BritBox.

angles.name: New UK Drama
angles.copy: A sweeping new drama arrives! 'A Woman of Substance', a fresh adaptation of the iconic story, premieres on BritBox today. Will you be watching?

angles.name: Yorkshire Roots
angles.copy: From Yorkshire maid to powerful businesswoman! The new adaptation of 'A Woman of Substance' starts today on BritBox. Set your watches, Yorkshire!

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Begin in Scotland
moments.blurb: School summer holidays officially begin in Scotland this Friday, June 26, with other UK regions following in July.

angles.name: Scotland's Summer Break
angles.copy: Freedom! 🥳 School's out for summer in Scotland this Friday, June 26! What are your big plans for the long break?

angles.name: Summer Fun Begins
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially kicking off in parts of the UK this week! Wishing all students a fantastic break. What's your favourite summer activity?

angles.name: Planning Ahead
angles.copy: Summer holidays are rolling in! For those not off yet, the countdown is on. England and Wales schools break up in July. What are you looking forward to?

moments.title: Reflecting on the Summer Solstice
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day of the year, occurred just days ago on Sunday, June 21, still casting a glow over the start of summer.

angles.name: Lingering Light
angles.copy: Those long, light evenings are still here after the Summer Solstice on Sunday! How did you make the most of the longest day of the year?

angles.name: Summer Officially Here
angles.copy: Even though the Solstice has passed, summer is officially in full swing! What's your favourite thing about this time of year in the UK?
